name: Min-Cheol Jin
description: A programmer and childhood friend of [Ji-A Han](https://anilist.co/character/266483).

name: Mirai Asahina
description: Mirai is a thirteen-year-old girl who is just about to enter junior high. She's a strange, funny, lovely and energetic girl who is interested in various things. Her stuffed bear Mofurun that she was given by her grandmother, Kanako, is very important to her and she admires Riko a lot. Her goal is to study magic she loves while trying to gain Riko's admiration. Mirai's alter ego is the legendary Cure Miracle.

name: Nonna
description: She's the vice commander of the Pravda Girls High School Sensha-Dō team, as well as its sniper. She mainly operates a Soviet T-34-85 tank, although she can also operate an IS-2 as well. In the anime, she only missed one shot when she served as the gunner of IS-2. Throughout her public and private life she has followed the various actions of Katyusha.

Cold and malicious, Ryoga flaunts his power by taking the Decks of the people he defeats. description: Serafall Leviathan is one of the four Satans of the Underworld with the title Leviathan. She was formerly named Serafall Sitri and is the older sister of Sona Sitri.

name: Shino Inuzuka

name: Sonya
description: Sonya is an assassin undercover as a student. She is always on guard against enemies to the point of being paranoid and even harming others if she is startled. Although highly skilled in combat she is still a scaredy-cat, mostly towards insects and ghosts. She frequently argues with Oribe when she gets her ideas.

name: Soo-Hwa Kang
description: Height: 172 cm (5'8'') Soo-Hwa is a young man who is broke and desperately looking for a job. After an incident involving Cafe Goyo employees, he sees an opportunity to start work.

name: Sun
description: Sun's first appearance was when he was being transported to Behemdolg to be sold as a slave, when the group of soldiers guarding the caravan decided to execute some of these slaves as examples for the others to fear. It was at this time that Agni happened to be passing by. Agni, having rescued Sun and the prisoners by killing the soldiers continues on his track to kill Doma. However, Sun decided to follow Agni. name: Tooru Ichii
description: A short first year student who often has overly long sleeves. She is very protective of Run and will punish anyone who tries to make a move on her. She also frequently accosts Run's classmate, Yuuko, because of a misunderstanding on the day they met.

name: Toshiyuki Karasawa
description: A classmate who tends to wear a baseball cap. He lives next door to the Funky High School Girls and is a target of their harrassments.
